questions.context_sentence: No Rules, No Order
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: “入”(ru)门须懂rule(规则)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'rule' mean in Chinese?
questions.cn: 没有规矩，不成方圆

questions.meaning: n.秩序;命令 v.点菜;命令
questions.context_sentence: No Rules, No Order
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: or(或者) der(得)，必须遵守秩序否则得受罚。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “秩序；命令”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 没有规矩，不成方圆

questions.context_sentence: Students like us follow rules!
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 佛罗(fol-low)里达州的人喜欢跟随潮流。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We must ____ the school rules and arrive on time. (提示: 遵循;跟随)
options: v. 对待;招待;治疗 n. 款待
questions.cn: 像我们这样的学生遵守规则！

questions.context_sentence: Arrive on time.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: ar(阿) rive(河)，到达(arrive)河边。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What time does the train ____ at the station? (提示: 到达)
options: n.工作日 (星期一至星期五的任何一天)
questions.cn: 准时到达。

questions.context_sentence: Arrive on time.
questions.hint: 字面联想: 踩在(on)那个时间点(time)上，即准时。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “准时”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 准时到达。

questions.context_sentence: Don't run in the hallways.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法: hall(大厅) + way(路) = 走廊。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is a 'hallway'?
questions.cn: 不要在走廊里跑。

questions.context_sentence: Wear the school uniform.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法: uni(统一) + form(形式) = 统一形式的衣服(制服)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “校服；制服”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 穿校服。

questions.context_sentence: Don't litter. Keep your school clean and tidy.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 立刻(lit)特(ter)别脏，因为有人乱扔垃圾。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Don't ____! Put your trash in the bin. (提示: 乱扔 n.垃圾)
questions.cn: 不要乱扔垃圾。保持学校干净整洁。

questions.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 破(po)烂特(lite)别有礼貌的人不会穿。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If you are 'polite', you have ____.
options: n.秩序;命令 v.点菜;命令
n.工作日 (星期一至星期五的任何一天)
questions.cn: 要有礼貌，尊重每一个人。

questions.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法: re(一再) + spect(看) = 一再看某人，表示尊敬。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “尊敬；尊重”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 要有礼貌，尊重每一个人。

questions.meaning: v. 对待;招待;治疗 n. 款待
questions.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 踹它(treat)，这可不是对待动物的好方式。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Please ____ other people the way you want to be treated. (提示: 对待;招待;治疗 n. 款待)
questions.cn: 要有礼貌，尊重每一个人。

questions.context_sentence: Put up your hand if you want to ask your teacher a question.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 衣服(if)如果破了就缝一下。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does the conjunction 'if' mean?
questions.cn: 如果你想问老师问题，请举手。

questions.context_sentence: Sally mustn't wear her own jacket at school.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 杰克(Jack)特(et)别喜欢穿夹克衫。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “夹克衫”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 莎莉不能在学校穿她自己的外套。

questions.context_sentence: She has to wear the uniform.
questions.hint: 词组联想: have(有) + to(去做) = 有责任去做，不得不。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “不得不”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 她必须穿制服。

questions.context_sentence: Is everything OK?
questions.hint: 复合词: every(每) + thing(事情) = 每件事。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the meaning of 'everything'?
questions.cn: 一切都好吗？

questions.context_sentence: Here, I can lend you my pen.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 懒的(lend)人总是借东西。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Could you ____ me your eraser? I forgot mine. (提示: 借给;借出)
questions.cn: 这里，我可以把我的笔借给你。

questions.context_sentence: Would you like a sweet?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 斯威特(sweet)，吃起来甜甜的糖果。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: A 'sweet' is a kind of ____.
questions.cn: 你想要一块糖吗？

questions.context_sentence: We can't eat snacks in class.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 蛇(snake)吃死耐克(snack)小吃会噎着。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “零食；小吃”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 我们不能在课堂上吃零食。

questions.context_sentence: Yes, of course.
questions.hint: 词组联想: course原意过程/路线，沿着理所当然的路线即为“当然”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'of course' mean?
questions.cn: 是的，当然。

questions.context_sentence: Oh, but we can't / mustn't bring our mobile phones to class.
questions.hint: 复合联想: 可移动的(mobile)电话(phone) = 手机。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “手机”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 哦，但是我们不能带手机去上课。

questions.context_sentence: We have to turn them off and put/keep them in our lockers.
questions.hint: 动作联想: 扭转(turn)使其离开(off)工作状态=关掉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Please ____ the lights before you leave the room.
questions.cn: 我们必须把它们关掉，然后放在我们的储物柜里。

questions.context_sentence: Don't jump the queue.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 字母Q的发音，排队的人形就像一个Q。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “队伍”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 不要插队。

questions.context_sentence: Don't jump the queue.
questions.hint: 字面联想: 跳过(jump)队伍(queue) = 插队。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: To 'jump the queue' is considered ____.
questions.cn: 不要插队。

questions.context_sentence: I can feed my dog many kinds of food, but I can't give him chocolate.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 飞的(feed)鸟需要喂养。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Don't ____ the animals in the zoo. (提示: 喂养;饲养)
questions.cn: 我可以喂我的狗很多种食物，但是我不能给他巧克力。

questions.context_sentence: Can I leave the classroom if I don't feel well?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 礼物(leave)留下了，人离开了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I will ____ home for school at seven o'clock. (提示: 离开;留下)
questions.cn: 如果我感觉不舒服，我可以离开教室吗？

questions.context_sentence: you have to tell your teacher about it when you are absent from class.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法: ab(离开) + sent(送) = 送走了就不在场，即缺席的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If you are 'absent', you are NOT ____.
questions.cn: 当你旷课的时候，你必须告诉你的老师。

questions.context_sentence: Shh, we must talk quietly in the library.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆法: quiet(安静的) + ly(副词后缀) = 安静地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “轻声地；安静地”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 嘘，我们必须在图书馆里小声说话。

questions.context_sentence: Can you put on your seat belt?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 抱他(belt)得先解开安全带。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: A 'seat belt' is used for ____ in a car.
options: v. 对待;招待;治疗 n. 款待
questions.cn: 你能系上安全带吗？

questions.context_sentence: We mustn't make noise.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 弄死(noise)那些故意制造噪音的人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “噪音”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 我们不能制造噪音。

questions.context_sentence: Why is Alice unhappy?
questions.hint: 前缀记忆法: un(不) + happy(快乐) = 不快乐。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'unhappy' mean?
questions.cn: 爱丽丝为什么不高兴？

questions.context_sentence: Every morning, I have to make my bed before breakfast.
questions.hint: 场景联想: 制造(make)一个舒适的床(bed) = 铺床。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “铺床；整理床铺”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 每天早上，我必须在吃早饭前整理床铺。

questions.context_sentence: I mustn't use my phone in class either.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 挨着(either)他也不行 (用于否定)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I don't like coffee, and she doesn't like it ____. (提示: 也(用于否定词组后))
questions.cn: 我也不能在课堂上使用手机。

questions.context_sentence: I can only play basketball after I practise the piano.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 扑克提示(practise)需要反复练习。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He needs to ____ speaking English every day. (提示: 训练;练习)
questions.cn: 我只有在练习钢琴之后才能打篮球。

questions.context_sentence: I can't hang out with my friends on weekdays.
questions.hint: 动作联想: 挂(hang)在外面(out)无所事事 = 闲逛。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: To 'hang out' with friends means to ____.
questions.cn: 我工作日不能和朋友出去玩。

questions.context_sentence: I can't hang out with my friends on weekdays.
questions.hint: 复合词: week(周) + day(天) = 一周中上班的日子(工作日)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “工作日（周一至周五）”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 我工作日不能和朋友出去玩。

questions.context_sentence: I know some rules are important, but this is awful!
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 嗷夫(awful)，发出好糟糕的叫声。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'awful' mean?
questions.cn: 我知道有些规定很重要，但是这太糟糕了！

questions.context_sentence: But they can help you to become a better person.
questions.hint: 复合词联想: be(存在) + come(来) = 到来成为某种状态。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The caterpillar will soon ____ a beautiful butterfly. (提示: 变成;成为)
questions.cn: 但是它们可以帮助你成为一个更好的人。

questions.context_sentence: But they can help you to become a better person.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 破损(person)的是一个假人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'person' mean in Chinese?
questions.cn: 但是它们可以帮助你成为一个更好的人。

questions.context_sentence: You can't use your phone in class because you need to focus on learning.
questions.hint: 搭配记忆法: 把聚焦点放到(on)某事上。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: You should ____ your homework now.
questions.cn: 你不能在课堂上使用手机，因为你需要专注于学习。

questions.context_sentence: You have to wear a uniform because it builds school spirit.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 死拼(spirit)到底的体育精神。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “精神；情绪”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 你必须穿校服，因为它能培养学校精神。

questions.context_sentence: You can relax after you finish your homework.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法: re(再) + lax(松弛) = 使紧绷的神经再次松弛(放松)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Listening to music helps me ____. (提示: 放松;休息)
questions.cn: 你完成作业后就可以放松了。

questions.context_sentence: What is your advice for each rule?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 爱得维斯(advice)，他给的建议非常忠诚。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'advice' mean?
questions.cn: 你对每条规则有什么建议？

questions.context_sentence: understand rules help me to become a better person
questions.hint: 复合词联想: under(在下面) + stand(站) = 站在下面认真听讲才能理解。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I don't ____ this math problem. Can you help me? (提示: 理解;领会)
questions.cn: 理解规则帮助我成为一个更好的人

questions.context_sentence: I mustn't let my desk get untidy.
questions.hint: 前缀记忆法: un(不) + tidy(整洁的) = 不整洁的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “不整洁的；凌乱的”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 我不能让我的桌子变得不整洁。

questions.context_sentence: In our class, we must get along well with others.
questions.hint: 情境联想: get(得到) + along(顺着) + well(好) = 大家顺着好脾气相处(相处融洽)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “相处融洽”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 在我们的班级里，我们必须与他人相处融洽。

questions.context_sentence: take care of the classroom
questions.hint: 词组联想: 拿出(take)关心(care)给(of)某人某物 = 照顾。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'take care of' mean?
questions.cn: 照顾教室

questions.context_sentence: Mary, slow down! Don't run in the hallway, please.
questions.hint: 字面联想: slow(慢) + down(下来) = 慢下来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: You are walking too fast. Please ____.
questions.cn: 玛丽，慢点！请不要在走廊里跑。

questions.context_sentence: Make sure to keep the school tidy.
questions.hint: 词组联想: 制造(make)一种确定的(sure)状态 = 确保。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'make sure' mean?
options: n.工作日 (星期一至星期五的任何一天)
questions.cn: 确保保持学校整洁。

questions.context_sentence: You can also think about the things you can do!
questions.hint: 词组联想: 脑海里想(think)关于(about)某件事 = 思考。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “思考；考虑”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 你也可以想想你能做些什么！

questions.context_sentence: You have to wear a uniform because it builds school spirit.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 彪的(build)工人喜欢快速建造东西。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The workers are going to ____ a new bridge over the river. (提示: 创建;建造)
questions.cn: 你必须穿校服，因为它能培养学校精神。
